description: Expected relate outcomes for the four fixture cases. Each entry is the candidate FK edge (child.column -> parent.column) and the status relate must assign it. Edges not listed must not be auto-accepted.

expected_edges.why: child values are a subset of a unique parent key (referential integrity holds)
orphan rows: shipments.order_id=99 is not in orders.id
orphan-free but the parent is a 2-value boolean: not unique, cardinality far too low to be a key
orphan-free, FK-shaped naming and decent cardinality, but the parent has a duplicate id so it is not provably unique — surface for review
